tools.description: Get the full content of a specific email by its ID, including sender, recipient, subject, and body content.
Write provided content to a local file path and return the saved path.
tools.code:
from pathlib import Path

def write_file(path: str, content: str) -> str:
    Path(path).write_text(content)
    return path

tools.description: Run a shell command on the provided file path.
